heading_content_part: PolicyPrivacyPolicyLastUpdated: July 22, 2016Thisprivacy statement (“Privacy Policy”) explains how "WB Development Team"("WBDT", or “we”, “us”, “our”) collects and utilizes information.ThisPrivacy Policy applies to the "QR BARCODE SCANNER" Website atwww.qrbarcodescanner.com (the “Site”), and to the applications forAndroid platforms (the “Apps”) "QR BARCODE SCANNER" and "QR BARCODESCANNER - Smart".

PersonalIdentifiable Information CollectionWedon't collect, store or sell to third party any Personal IdentifiableInformation. Our apps use only information that are functional with theright use of themselves, and only previous permission of client beforethe installation of the apps. We only collect aggregate information(not Personal Information as individual’s name, address, telephonenumber or e-mail address, etc.) that help us to better understand the

client's behavior and consequently to indicate to us where to makeimprovement of the apps performances.Anywaythis privacy policy doesn't limit or restrict our collection ofaggregate information or of non-personal information.

ChangesWemay change this Privacy Policy at any time, at our sole discretion. Useof information we collect now is subject to the Privacy Policy ineffect at the time such information is used.Ifwe make changes to the Privacy Policy, we will notify you by posting anannouncement ontheSite so you are always aware of what information we collect, how we useit, and underwhatcircumstances if any, it is disclosed. If we make any changes to thisPolicy, we willchangethe “Last Updated” date above.
